integracoes.segurancaTexto: The webhook URL is encrypted on the server, is never shown in full again, and can only be managed by the account owner.

assinatura.subtitulo: Create your professional signature with badges

assinatura.dicaCopia: Copy the HTML and paste it into your email client's signature settings (Gmail, Outlook, etc.).

instrucoes.titulo: How to add it to your email
instrucoes.out1: Open Outlook → File → Options → Mail → Signatures
instrucoes.out2: Create a new one and paste (Ctrl+V)
instrucoes.gm1: Open Gmail → Settings → See all settings
instrucoes.gm2: In the "Signature" section, create a new one and paste

ranking.subtitulo: Compete with the best Softinsa consultants

submeterCandidatura.semBadge: Select a badge to see its requirements.
submeterCandidatura.dicaHero: To earn this badge you must provide evidence for every mandatory requirement of the level. Attach the evidence for each one and submit for validation.
submeterCandidatura.requisitosIntro: Attach a file (PDF, JPG or PNG) that proves each requirement.
submeterCandidatura.erroFicheiroTipo: Only PDF, JPG or PNG files are accepted.
submeterCandidatura.semRequisitos: This badge has no requirements defined yet. Contact the administrator.
submeterCandidatura.avisoObrigatorios: Attach evidence to every mandatory requirement before submitting.
submeterCandidatura.prontoSubmeter: All set — you can submit the application.
submeterCandidatura.retomarInfo: You resumed a draft — continue and submit when complete.
submeterCandidatura.submetidaInfo: Application submitted — you can add more evidence until the Talent Manager validates.

sla.subtitulo: Response deadlines for the Talent and Service Line teams. Each team's active SLA defines when overdue alerts (email and push) are sent.
sla.vazio: No SLAs configured — the default of 5 days is used.
